queries.question: List all the airports with their geographical coordinates and capacity and show the highest capacity airports at the top.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Airports.City,
AirportDetails.Passenger_Throughput,
AirportDetails.Latitude,
AirportDetails.Longitude
FROM Airports
JOIN AirportDetails ON AirportDetails.AirportID = Airports.AirportID
ORDER BY AirportDetails.Passenger_Throughput DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?passenger_throughput ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput .
  ?airportdetails p:Latitude ?latitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?passenger_throughput_o)

queries.question: List all the airports with their geographical coordinates and capacity and show the highest capacity airports at the top.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Airports.City,
AirportDetails.Number_Of_Aircrafts,
AirportDetails.Latitude,
AirportDetails.Longitude
FROM Airports
JOIN AirportDetails ON AirportDetails.AirportID = Airports.AirportID
ORDER BY AirportDetails.Number_Of_Aircrafts DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?number_of_aircrafts ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts .
  ?airportdetails p:Latitude ?latitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_aircrafts_o)

queries.question: List all the airports with their geographical coordinates and capacity and show the highest capacity airports at the top.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Airports.City,
AirportDetails.Passenger_Throughput, Number_Of_Aircrafts,
AirportDetails.Latitude,
AirportDetails.Longitude
FROM Airports
JOIN AirportDetails ON AirportDetails.AirportID = Airports.AirportID
ORDER BY AirportDetails.Passenger_Throughput, Number_Of_Aircrafts DESC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?passenger_throughput ?number_of_aircrafts ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts .
  ?airportdetails p:Latitude ?latitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput_o .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?passenger_throughput_o) DESC(?number_of_aircrafts_o)

queries.question: List all the cities and respective countries that have an airport in the western hemisphere and the number of aircrafts at those airports.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Airports.City,
Airports.Country,
AirportDetails.Number_Of_Aircrafts
FROM Airports
JOIN AirportDetails ON AirportDetails.AirportID = Airports.AirportID
WHERE Longitude < 0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?city ?country ?number_of_aircrafts WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airports p:Country ?country .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?longitude_f) < 0)
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all the airports with their geographical coordinates and capacity and show the highest capacity airports at the top.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?city ?number_of_aircrafts ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts .
  ?airportdetails p:Latitude ?latitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?number_of_aircrafts_o) }
  full: { SELECT ?city ?passenger_throughput ?number_of_aircrafts ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts .
  ?airportdetails p:Latitude ?latitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput_o .
  ?airportdetails p:Number_Of_Aircrafts ?number_of_aircrafts_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?passenger_throughput_o) DESC(?number_of_aircrafts_o) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?city ?passenger_throughput ?latitude ?longitude WHERE {
  ?airports a :Airports .
  ?airportdetails a :AirportDetails .
  ?airportdetails p:hasAirports_AirportID ?airports .
  ?airports p:City ?city .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput .
  ?airportdetails p:Latitude ?latitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Longitude ?longitude .
  ?airportdetails p:Passenger_Throughput ?passenger_throughput_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?passenger_throughput_o) }
}
